title: Visualizing Distance Between Sets in a Metric Space
description: A geometric diagram showing two sets A and B in a metric space (X,d), illustrating the definitions of distance between sets, distance from a point to a set, and the concept of disjoint sets with positive distance.
elements: Distance d(x, A) from point to set
relationships: d(A,B) = inf{d(a,b) : a ∈ A, b ∈ B}
Sets A and B are disjoint with a positive distance between them
